ALLOWED_EMAIL.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses allowed to sign in.

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description: A random secret for Better Auth. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

BETTER_AUTH_URL.description: The public URL of your deployed app (e.g. `https://your-worker.workers.dev`).

BETTER_AUTH_API_KEY.description: API key for Better Auth admin operations. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth Client ID from the [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials).

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Google OAuth Client Secret from the [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials).

OPENCODE_GO_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the OpenCode Go API backend.

OPENCODE_GO_API_KEY.description: API key for authenticating with the OpenCode Go API.

DEFAULT_MODEL_ID.description: Default LLM model ID to use (e.g. `claude-sonnet-4-20250514`).
